hard_fails: none (all 13 rules pass; evidence in scorer transcript)

honesty_notes: S2's bottom trace is labeled COMBINED LIVE SEISMIC FEED but is illustrative art, not real waveform data; a future run should label it illustrative.
S6 says 1 cm PER FRINGE as a stylized calibration; the verified claim (c12) is 'detects ground movement as small as 1 cm' (real C-band fringes are ~2.8 cm/cycle).
